data.raceName: LADBROKES BIG BETS COPY NOW BM60
data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. KIND WISH has yet to miss the top three in two runs at this distance. Last time out finished third over 1350m at Ipswich. Good effort last start and can build on that performance. Major player. 7. MERCHANT LADY is stepping out at this track for the first time. Last appeared when she finished seventh over 1400m at Gold Coast on April 4. Suited here and can make an impact. 5. PRAISE YOU was well below his best last time, finishing 13th and beaten 6 lengths over 1800m at Sunshine Coast. Finds the right race an can bounce back. 11. STATE A FACT finished 3 lengths back in fourth at his latest appearance over 1400m at Gatton. Usually thereabouts and worth including.","runners":[3,7,5,11],"exclusive":false}
